narrative:
31 Ohio House district has 86,287 registered voters, with 56.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.1%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.9 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +4.2% D−R vs +2.0% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
